meta.title: About Eye On Idea — B2B Digital Agency, Denmark
meta.description: Eye On Idea is a Danish B2B digital agency — we help SMB companies build credible websites and brand presence, built for the long term.

hero.title: A structured partner, not a broad agency
hero.subtitle: Eye On Idea is a focused digital consultancy for SMB B2B companies that need a more credible and coherent presence online — built deliberately, not assembled piece by piece.

story.title: The problem most agencies don't solve
story.imageAlt: Brand and website elements converging from fragmentation into a cohesive, structured identity system
paragraphs: Most SMB B2B companies don't have a digital presence problem in isolation. They have a fragmentation problem: a website that doesn't reflect the quality of the business, a brand that feels inconsistent, content that doesn't explain what they actually do, and no clear owner for any of it.

Eye On Idea was founded in 2025 to fix that from the ground up. Not with a broad agency approach, but with a focused, package-structured model that maps to where a business actually is and what it genuinely needs.
Every project starts with understanding your situation. Every deliverable is built to last, to be manageable, and to make your business look the way it deserves to look.

founder.name: Rune M. P. Pjetursson
bio: Rune founded Eye On Idea because he kept seeing the same problem: companies that had invested in websites or identities, but ended up with something that didn't fit, was hard to manage, or slowly drifted away from the business it was supposed to represent.

His background spans technical web development, UX design, brand strategy, and working directly with clients across Europe. He built Eye On Idea around the principle that a digital partner should take responsibility for the whole picture — not just the deliverable.

philosophy.title: How I work
philosophy.text: When you work with Eye On Idea, you deal with one person who understands the full scope of what you need — technically, visually, and commercially. I don't disappear at launch. I stay involved because the work doesn't stop being useful when the project is technically finished.

items.title: Clarity
items.description: We build solutions that you understand and can manage. Clear structure leads to better results.

items.title: Partnership
items.description: We stay involved beyond delivery. Your success is part of our responsibility.

items.title: Honest Communication
items.description: We give clear advice and realistic expectations so you can make informed decisions.

items.title: Quality
items.description: We focus on durability, performance, and professional standards in every project.

location.title: Based in Denmark, Serving Europe
location.description: Eye On Idea is based in Aalborg, Denmark. We work with clients across the Nordic region and the European Union. Meetings can be held online or in person when needed.

cta.title: See how the package model works
cta.description: Foundation, Growth, and Brand Partner are built around business maturity — not just budget. Understanding the tiers usually answers most questions before the first conversation.
